roa.docketEntryComment: CIVIL JUDGMENT
CIVIL JUDGMENT

/DAW/MOD JUDGMENT TO 5YRS PROB ORDER TO ISSUE/X:PURSUANT TO THE COURT OF APPEAL'S REMITTITUR, THE CLERICAL ERROR, REFLECTED ON THE COURT MINUTES FOR NOVEMBER 4, 1997 IS HEREBY ORDERED TO BE CORRECTED TO REFLECT A PROBATION TERM OF 5 YEARS,/
/CAL  SURRENDER//X DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR STAY DENIED,/SURRD///X AFTER DEFENDANT HAS SERVED 6 MONTHS, THE SHERIFF MAY PUT HER ON///HOME MONITORING,/                                               /

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ1Y/CTS:1//WS/VF4:$200/REST:$35,181,54/PC/PSR//BOOKING FEE//DEF:NOT TO TAKE JOB HANDLING OTHER PEOPLES MONEY/ACCEP///DEF:ELIGIBLE FOR HOME DETENTION IN 6 MONTHS/SUR1:11-06-97//H1:971106/0845/S23
/SEE MINUTES OF 09-03-97, DEPARTMENT 21,///THE MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR,//TR:970915/0930/S22
/TEXT:TRANS FROM DEPT 22 TO DEPT 21//TRANS 21 FW: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE///CTORD:CAUSE DEEMED PRETRIED//PC:970909/1030/S22/TR:970915/0930/S22
/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/DEFT INSTR 987,2//FAW/DEFT ARR//TN1/GTW/987,2//PC:970520/1400/S22/TR:970616/0930/S22
/X:CIVIL JUDGMENT SIGNED,/CTORD:PROBATION IS HEREBY TERMINATED/
/PROB ADM REV/CONTD:CIVIL JUDGMENT/
/TEXT:JUDGMENT AFFIRMED; REMITTITUR SPREAD UPON MINUTES/
CRT FND DEFT GOF CT1,487(A)PC/F;CRT GRNT DA MO DISM REM COUNTS 2 TO 51REF APD PRES AND CONT 11/4/97 FOR SENT AT 930AM IN D4 B-4 JUDGE SING
/TEXT:TRANS FROM DEPT 22 TO DEPT 24//TRANS 24 FW: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE///THE CAUSE IS ORDERED TRANSFERRED TO FOLSOM STREET, DEPARTMENT 4,/
/MO TO CONT:BY DEFENSE//CONTS GTW//MO GRTD//TR:971006/0930/S22
/MO TO CONT BY DISTRICT ATTORNEY//CONTS GTW//MO GRTD//PC:970909/1030/S22/TR:970915/0930/S22
/CTORD CAUSE DEEMED PRETRIED//TR:970616/0930/S22
CONT 5/21/97 930AM D27 FOR PTC
/TEXT TRANS FROM DEPT 22 TO DEPT 27//TRANS 27 FW  PRETRIAL CONFERENCE//TR:970616/0930/S22
MOT TO CONT PX GRANTED
